milestones.title: Third-Party Integrations
milestones.description: API access requests, developer program applications, and partner approvals needed to unlock product features.

tasks.title: Meta App Review — instagram_content_publish
tasks.notes: Unlocks: restaurant owners can post menu photos to Instagram/Facebook from AI-R. App ID: 798073232859278. Submitted during social-001 build session.

tasks.title: Olo Developer Program
tasks.notes: Unlocks: commission-free consumer ordering for 800+ brands. Flagged as Week 4 miss — apply ASAP.

tasks.title: Uber Eats API Access
tasks.notes: Unlocks: KitchenHub-style delivery order sync for Uber Eats. Uber One fee hike live Mar 19.

tasks.title: DoorDash Partnership API
tasks.notes: Unlocks: delivery order sync + chargeback data. Email partnerships@doordash.com.

tasks.title: Check Payroll (checkhq.com)
tasks.notes: Jacqueline Haboush-Flores (jacqueline@checkhq.com) reached out Mar 11. Overview sent — API + Check Components (iframe UIs), W2/1099, 2-day payroll. Replied Mar 20 requesting call any day after 2 PM ET. Waiting on scheduling.

tasks.title: KitchenHub API
tasks.notes: Unlocks: kh-002 — delivery order sync. May require partnership agreement.

tasks.title: Google Ads API
tasks.notes: Developer token issued: 9wcwS52jkAJZfqBG7OLOsA. Manager account: 414-228-6017. Access level: Test Account. Apply for Basic to hit production.

tasks.title: QuickBooks Online — Intuit Developer
tasks.notes: Unlocks: qb-001 — QuickBooks daily sales export from AI-R. Need sandbox + production app.

tasks.title: GrubHub API / Partner Integration
tasks.notes: Unlocks: delivery order sync for GrubHub orders into AI-R dashboard. Outreach sent 2026-03-20.

tasks.title: KitchenHub API (unified DoorDash + Uber Eats + GrubHub)
tasks.notes: KitchenHub = ONE API for DoorDash + Uber Eats + GrubHub. Has Reseller/White-label program for POS platforms. Demo form submitted 2026-03-20. Reseller program outreach in progress. Tech: kh-002 sprint task in ai-r.json.

tasks.title: Otter Restaurant Platform Partnership
tasks.notes: Otter = delivery aggregator + POS. Become-a-partner form submitted 2026-03-20. Tech integration + referral/reseller partnership angle.

tasks.title: OpenTable API Integration
tasks.notes: Follow-up email sent 2026-03-20. Neil previously applied as Red Bar restaurant. Now pitching as AI-R platform integration — reservations on floor plan + manager dashboard.

tasks.title: Resy API Integration
tasks.notes: First outreach 2026-03-20. Tock sunsetting summer 2026 = opportunity. Pitching Resy as AI-R reservation layer for independent restaurants.

tasks.title: Yelp Fusion API
tasks.notes: First outreach 2026-03-20. Want reviews + ratings on AI-R dashboard + reputation management module.

tasks.title: SevenRooms API Integration
tasks.notes: ⚠️ TIME SENSITIVE — DoorDash acquiring SevenRooms. Outreach sent 2026-03-20 before acquisition closes. Pitching AI-R as independent restaurant alternative to DoorDash-controlled guest data. Reservations + guest profiles on AI-R floor plan.

tasks.title: Reserve with Google
tasks.notes: Outreach sent 2026-03-20. Want to surface Google bookings in AI-R floor plan. Fast win — no third-party needed.
